ChangeRequest.name: [IReF] Add Unique Product Identifier
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
# Overview BIRD needs to add the `Unique Product Identifier` (UPI) to the _Over the counter (OTC) derivative_ and perhaps also to the _Exchange tradable derivative_.
### Contact person - @Arjan.Bos - @Olivia.Hauet
### Business definition UPI is a number that is externally assigned and that uniquely identifies an Over the counter (OTC) Derivative instrument.
### Legal definition https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#iso:std:iso:4914:ed-1:v1:en
https://www.bis.org/cpmi/publ/d141.pdf
### Reason for inclusion The Unique Product Identifier has been made available for all Over the counter derivatives that have an ISIN, according to the [ISO standard 4914](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#iso:std:iso:4914:ed-1:v1:en).
To consider is if we need to include ISIN for OTC Derivatives too.
### Relationships - _Over the counter (OTC) derivative_ - `ISIN`
### Relevant Framework/Template Relevant for IReF
### Additional documentation/links (optional) _[Additional info]_
### Before closing checklist - [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Other actions
